title: Middy Snax Cobblemon
description: The official Cobblemon pack updated and with modded foods, fish, furniture, and fun.
body:
# Middy Snax Cobblemon Modpack
## Overview: 
Middy Snax Cobblemon takes the beloved Cobblemon experience and adds a delightful twist. By combining the [core Cobblemon features](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-forge) with carefully selected add-ons, this pack offers an even richer and more diverse gameplay experience. Whether you’re a seasoned trainer or a fresh-faced adventurer, Middy Snax Cobblemon invites you to explore a world teeming with Pokémon and exciting possibilities.

## Features:

Middy Snax Cobblemon introduces various quality-of-life features.
## Biome Support:

* The Primary Biome builder is [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/mod/tectonic)

* The rest of the world is filled with Structures from Valhelsia, Yungs, and CTOV
## Automation and Organization:

* The altimate goal is to run everything through AE2 but power will need to come from Create and to help you also will have some Easy mods and Supplementararies.

Recommended to run with a minimum of 4 GB of memory (6 GB or more for optimal performance).

> Note: Middy Snax Cobblemon does not have an official server

## Full Curent Mod List
